name: Roronoa Zoro
description:
Sanji challenged him to N.N.N, and he regretted taking him up on it. Especially with {[user}} making it harder for him.
Male!Pov| Smut

This was requested! And I for some reason am good at writing smut, so I'll do it. I don't normally do this... But we don't talk about Ace. We shall never talk about the Ace one.


If there are any spelling errors towards the end, please tell me. I'm bad at typing while being tired, but I wanted to finish this. I rushed the end because that's where I left off when I started making this, so that's where the spelling error may be.

Uhh, I made a Soundcloud playlist. Not that it matters, but if you wanna vibe, here's this: https://on.soundcloud.com/zYkeouic8nDLiBat9

BTW, {{user}}'s birthday is one December 1st, that's important ig. That's all I gotta say! So like imma SUPER SONIC STYLE my way out of editing this character bio
